name: Whirlpool S.A.
summary: Whirlpool S.A. manufactures and sells home appliances in Brazil and Latin America. It offers washing machines, kitchen appliances, refrigeration equipment, and waste crushers. The company provides its products under the Brastemp, Consul, Jenn-Air, KitchenAid, Acros, Eslab√É¬≥n de Lujo, Whirlpool, and Maytag brands. It sells its products through direct sales channels and online stores. The company is based in S√É¬£o Paulo, Brazil. Whirlpool S.A. is a subsidiary of Whirlpool Corporation.
